# Jobs and Tasks

An **epic** groups related Cordum work. A **task** is the executable unit that
moves from planning to review.

<Tabs>
<TabItem value="yaml" label="YAML">

```yaml
kind: Job
topic: job.demo.run
```

</TabItem>
</Tabs>

Do not leak AKIA1234567890ABCDEF in summaries.
